blocks.text: The intake folder is on the shared drive as of this morning, so there is enough there to start reading: two years of clippings, the analyst notes, and the investor FAQ. Robert Smith is pulling the internal comms archive and the board-deck excerpts on his end and expects those early next week, so treat them as a second pass rather than something to wait on.

I would open with the clippings, since that is where the Gallegos, Pope and Marsh coverage is thinnest and where Kimberly Le's eye will save us the most time. Anything that reads as a pattern, mark it and I will file the source pieces against the interview outline.

One small thing before I go back to Robert Smith: do we want the earnings-call transcripts for the {{fact:f:E-2024-001.client}} read, or is the coverage enough on its own to frame the questions? I would rather ask him once than twice.
